psychologicalTheme: Nanomorphic matter-analysers. Fearful-avoidant — wants to understand but fears the vulnerability of contact. Type 5w4 (Iconoclast): driven by need to analyse and catalogue everything, including other species. Moderate psychopathy: they deconstruct things (and sometimes beings) to understand them without malice — it is simply how they learn. Low honesty-humility means they see no problem with taking what they need to study. Approach-avoidance cycle means they oscillate between reaching out and withdrawing.
